response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 13+ years of experience spanning frontend, backend, mobile, and embedded systems, well above the 6+ year requirement. Current role at re:cinq directly involves TypeScript/Node.js plus AI-agent infrastructure (MCP), matching both the primary stack and the AI agent development requirement. Demonstrated craftsmanship via TDD, pairing, CI/CD at RIDE Capital, plus strong testing background (Selenium course, Fluent-Asserts library). Gaps include no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention, limited React depth shown, and no Kotlin experience, but the foundation is solid enough that ramp-up should be quick.
strengths: Direct TypeScript/Node.js + AI agent/MCP experience at current role aligns precisely with stack and AI requirement
Deep testing and software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored test libraries, taught Selenium courses)
Polyglot full-stack breadth across web, mobile, embedded, plus Docker/Kubernetes and MongoDB/SQL exposure
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed — primary stack frameworks not confirmed
No Kotlin or Java backend service experience for the secondary stack requirement
React experience is mentioned only briefly (Optilyz); frontend depth versus the heavy DLang/Ember history is unclear
